# Spreedly MCP Server

> MCP server providing AI access to the Spreedly payments API

## Overview

This MCP server wraps the Spreedly Core API (https://core.spreedly.com/v1) with 80+ tools organized across 13 domains. Authentication uses HTTP Basic Auth via environment variables.

## Authentication

Required env vars: SPREEDLY_ENVIRONMENT_KEY, SPREEDLY_ACCESS_SECRET

## Domains

- gateways: CRUD, authorize, purchase, verify, store, credit (13 tools)
- transactions: list, show, capture, void, credit, workflows (12 tools)
- paymentMethods: CRUD, retain, redact, recache, events (13 tools)
- receivers: CRUD, deliver, export (8 tools)
- certificates: CRUD, generate (4 tools)
- environments: CRUD, access secrets (9 tools)
- merchantProfiles: CRUD (4 tools)
- subMerchants: CRUD (4 tools)
- events: list, show (2 tools)
- protection: claims, events, providers (5 tools)
- sca: authenticate, providers (3 tools)
- cardRefresher: inquiry, list (3 tools)
- networkTokenization: metadata, status (2 tools)

## Tool Naming

Pattern: spreedly_<domain>_<action>
Examples: spreedly_gateway_authorize, spreedly_transaction_capture

## Amounts

All monetary amounts are in cents (integer). Currency codes are ISO 4217.

## Links

- Docs: https://docs.spreedly.com
- API Reference: https://docs.spreedly.com/reference/api/v1/
- Source: https://github.com/spreedly/spreedly-mcp
